title: Droga Do Pałacu
description:
Road to the White House is a satirical strategy game about a presidential campaign, where you guide your candidate through a tense battle for power. The game consists of 16 turns, and each one brings new decisions, risks, and political opportunities.

During the campaign, you will:

• earn money for further campaign activities,

• attack your opponents and weaken their support,

• take part in debates,

• buy campaign materials and develop your campaign,

• fight for different voter groups,

• manage your campaign team, media, budget, and sponsors,

• sell yourself to millionaires in exchange for financial support,

• choose campaign promises,

• organize events and promotional actions,

• make risky behind-the-scenes decisions.

Each turn forces you to choose between advertising, debates, rest, political attacks, fundraising, and building an advantage over your rivals. The goal of the game is to survive the campaign, gain voters’ trust, reach the second round, and ultimately win the Palace.
description_short: Road to the White House is a satirical strategy game about a presidential campaign. Manage your candidate, campaign team, media, budget, and rivals, make risky decisions during debates and events, and try to win the election before the campaign gets the better of you.
